title: Pro Placer
description: Bedrock Edition-like easy and accurate block placement and breaking plus reach-around placement for fast bridging.
body:
📖 About:

Pro Placer overhauls the block placing logic to mimic the behavior on Bedrock Edition, making it a whole lot easier and faster to use.

📚 Contents:

In vanilla Minecraft when holding down the button for placing blocks the game tries to place a block every 4 game ticks, no matter what. This very often leads to unwanted gaps or double placing.

Pro Placer removes that behavior while the button for placing is held down. Instead a new block is placed down as quickly as possible without any delay at all.

To avoid random blocks being placed where they don't belong the direction the player is placing blocks in is locked as long as the mouse button is being held down. This means accidentally hovering over different blocks outside of said direction will not actually lead to new blocks being placed.

Additionally blocks can be placed by simply clicking air blocks if they belong to the direction being built towards, vastly simplifying things like building in creative mode while flying and roof construction.

✏️ Notes:

This mod runs purely one the client-side. It therefor even works when playing on a vanilla server.
